title.ko: 종이, 판지 또는 종이와 같은 방식으로 가공되는 재료의 기계적 가공 또는 변형 (전체가 종이 또는 판지로 구성되지 않은 적층체의 제조 B32B)
title.en: MECHANICAL WORKING OR DEFORMATION OF PAPER, CARDBOARD OR MATERIAL WORKED IN A MANNER ANALOGOUS TO PAPER (making layered products not composed wholly of paper or cardboard B32B)

title.ko: 재료를 제거하지 않는 종이나 판지의 기계적 변형, 예. 적층과 조합된 것
title.en: Mechanical deformation without removing material, e.g. in combination with laminating

title.ko: 엠보싱 (파형 성형 B31F 1/20 ; 인쇄와 조합된 엠보싱 B41F 19/02, B41M 1/24 ;엠보싱을 위한 타자기 B41J 3/38 ;변형과 조합된 압인 B41K 3/36 )
title.en: Embossing (corrugating B31F0001200000;embossing in combination with printing B41F0019020000, B41M0001240000;typewriters for embossing B41J0003380000;stamping in combination with deforming B41K0003360000)

title.ko: 주름성형 (파형 성형 B31F 1/20; 지그재그 접힘성형 B65H 45/20)
title.en: Creasing (corrugating B31F0001200000;zig-zag folding B65H0045200000)
by rotary tools
Crêping
by doctor blades arranged crosswise to the web
by elastic belts
by tools arranged in the direction of web feed
Corrugating; Corrugating combined with laminating to other layers
Making webs in which the channel of each corrugation is longitudinal with the web feed
Making webs in which the channel of each corrugation is transverse to the web feed
by interengaging toothed cylinders
combined with uniting the corrugated webs to flat webs
by making use of rods, e.g. co-operating with a toothed cylinder
Tools secured to endless chains
Corrugating already corrugated webs
Moistening and heating webs to facilitate mechanical deformation and drying deformed webs
Attaching together sheets, strips or webs; Reinforcing edges
by crimpling or slotting
by exclusive use of adhesives
by adhesive tape
for reinforcing edges
Processes not otherwise provided for
Breaking coatings, e.g. on paper or cardboard
